corpus_name: SEC EDGAR Public Filing Sample Rendered PDF - Section Retrieval Evaluation

source_metadata.license_or_usage_note: SEC EDGAR filings are public records. Automated access must follow SEC fair-access guidance, including efficient scripting, a clear User-Agent, and request moderation.
source_metadata.attribution_requirement: Record SEC company, CIK, accession number, form type, filing date, source URL, and source format in generated manifests.
source_metadata.rendering_limitations: Rendered PDFs preserve extracted visible text for ingestion; they are not evidence of visual-layout fidelity.

section_labeling.method: conservative regex heading extraction over rendered SEC PDF text
limitations: Section labels are generated from rendered SEC PDF text with conservative heading regexes.
Page ranges are approximate and should be interpreted as retrieval labels, not legal or financial correctness labels.
The extractor skips table-of-contents hits when detected, but rendered HTML/PDF quirks may still affect page mapping.
No raw SEC filing text is written to the generated labels or manifest.
